ksa_text: Knowledge of data literacy concepts, including reading and interpreting charts, understanding data sources, recognizing misleading visualizations, and applying basic statistical reasoning.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA OP-K-005 (OP, Knowledge) does not clear the moderate fit inclusion threshold of 0.43. Composite score 0.4234 is insufficient to establish relevance to analytics and business intelligence at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (ddat=0.423, nice=0.412, onet=0.411) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: OP domain KSA OP-K-005 excluded at composite 0.4234, but KSA text contains direct analytics-domain signals. Internal consistency: the presence of analytics terminology in a moderate fit KSA at score 0.4234 suggests the threshold is excluding genuinely relevant content.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.rebuttal: Composite 0.4234 with confirmed analytics-domain terminology for a OP (moderate fit) KSA indicates real role relevance for Data Analyst. The 0.43 threshold is a calibration heuristic; text-signal confirmation overrides marginal score shortfall at this level.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude overturned. OP KSA with composite 0.4234 and confirmed analytics-domain text signals included on internal consistency grounds.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA OP-K-005 (OP, composite 0.4234) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: KSA content aligns with DDAT Senior Data Analyst and Lead Analyst profiles; operational workflow competencies documented in IC-to-senior-IC analytics roles. Analytics-domain terminology in KSA text confirms practical relevance to IC ANL work. Composite 0.4234 with signal across ddat=0.423, nice=0.412, onet=0.411 is consistent with documented ANL competency expectations at IC-to-senior-IC level. External ground truth supports inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include upheld. External evidence from OP-domain frameworks confirms KSA relevance to Data Analyst at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Single adversarial overturn by P3 internal consistency. Final decision: include. Composite 0.4234, domain OP. Medium confidence — one agent challenged and overturned the preliminary assessment.
